statement: In every magma, Equation 2398 (`x = (y * (z * (z * x))) * x`) implies Equation 2456 (`x = (x * ((y * x) * x)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0090
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op z x))) x)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x (op (op y x) x)) x)
